title: astragalus purshii var. ordensis
intro: Astragalus purshii var. ordensis, also known as Ord's milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the northwestern United States and southwestern Canada. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to support immune function, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues and gastrointestinal disorders. The health benefits of Ord's milkvetch include improved immune response, enhanced endurance, and reduced inflammation, making it a popular herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Astragalus purshii var. ordensis can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
